[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000100 1
1 01100010 3
2 00101000 2
3 11111011 7
4 10011000 3
5 00001011 3
6 11111011 7
7 00000000 a

01 10 11100001 4
12 21 10100011 4
23 32 11111011 7 match 3 6
34 43 00001111 4
45 54 01101101 5
56 65 01000111 4
67 76 11111110 7
70 07 01100010 3 match 1

02 20 01000010 2
13 31 01011000 3
24 42 11110100 5
35 53 01100010 3 match 1
46 64 00101010 3
57 75 10111001 5
60 06 10011100 4
71 17 10000011 3

03 30 10111001 5
14 41 01010111 5
25 52 10011001 4
36 63 00100101 3
47 74 11010100 4
50 05 11011011 6
61 16 01111101 6
72 27 00100000 1

04 40 10110110 5
15 51 00111010 4
26 62 11011110 6
37 73 11011011 6
